style: commercial product photography minimalist modern High-Contrast Spotlight style
description: Creative concept detail: High-Contrast Spotlight visual layout style. A dark low-key backdrop holds a highly concentrated, dramatic ray of spotlight beaming directly onto the elegant dining table, accenting its rich marble patterns and gleaming metallic chairs.
